name: Google Calendar reminder system with AI and Slack
description: Fetches upcoming Google Calendar events, uses Claude AI to prioritize and format reminders with context and preparation tips, then posts a structured daily briefing to Slack. Adapted from n8n's Google Calendar reminder system with GPT-4o workflow.

source.originalName: Google Calendar 📅 reminder system with GPT-4o and Telegram

slackChannel.description: Slack channel ID for calendar reminders

hoursAhead.description: How many hours ahead to look for events

steps.name: Build time range for calendar query
Build Claude prompt for smart reminders
Build Slack Block Kit daily briefing
